nasb.text: Please take my gift which has been brought to you, because God has dealt graciously with me and because I have plenty.” Thus he urged him and he took it.

esv.text: Please accept my blessing that is brought to you, because God has dealt graciously with me, and because I have enough.” Thus he urged him, and he took it.

cnv.text: 請你收下我帶來給你的禮物，因為　神施恩給我，我甚麼都有了。”雅各再三懇求他，他才收下了。

ccb.text: 请你收下我的礼物吧，因为上帝恩待了我，使我富足。”雅各再三恳求，以扫才收下。

csbs.text: 请你收下我带给你的礼物吧！因为神恩待我，我什么都有了。”雅各再三劝说，他才收下。
